000000011111110101011001000 - ASI: 16

Rules:
  00 = 0 * 0
  10 = 1 * 0
  11 = 1 * 1
  000 = 0 * 00
  011 = 0 * 11
  1000 = 10 * 00
  1010 = 10 * 10
  1100 = 11 * 00
  1111 = 11 * 11
  000000 = 000 * 000
  101010 = 10 * 1010
  0111111 = 011 * 1111
  11001000 = 1100 * 1000
  0000000111111 = 000000 * 0111111
  10101011001000 = 101010 * 11001000
  000000011111110101011001000 = 0000000111111 * 10101011001000
